title: Workflow rule: explain after every commit (v1)
meta: Commit cc1f952 · tier full · entry #2 of 6
glance: Wires the understanding layer into agent behavior with an always-on rule and docs. (Commit #6 later removes the mandatory rule — read this for v1.)
backgroundDeep: Skills teach how to write explainers. Rules with alwaysApply: true tell agents when — loaded every Cursor session.
backgroundNarrow: Commit #1 added skills but no enforcement or human-facing layout docs.
goal: Make teaching docs as automatic as committing — code → commit → explainer.
intuition: Also documents where files live under docs/understanding/.

steps.label: understanding-layer.mdc
steps.body: Always applied: after each commit, run diff script, write explainer + quiz.

options: Rules alwaysApply for timing; skills teach method

quiz.q: Is always-on rule still active at PR end?
